Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's learning topics—covering the engineering data pipeline, pandas and NumPy basics, data loading and inspection, cleaning and preprocessing, and matplotlib visualization—used by learners to navigate the course content and by instructors to sequence instruction.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: An overview page listing and briefly describing each topic in the Engineering Data Analysis and Simulation module—from data acquisition pipelines and Python libraries to analysis and insight—used by learners to orient themselves to the module's scope and sequence before diving into individual lessons.
